ᝰ.ᐟ anyways, i'll be going on a semi-hiatus, meaning that i'll post a new bot only when i have a free time. my schedule is really tight nowadays bc i'm currently on full survival mode on my 3rd year since i have plenty of research, thesis, and other stressful stuff on my plate that'll keep me occupied for many months to come (bless my poor heart and mind)

ᝰ.ᐟ feedback and reviews is much appreciated 𖹭
